data.content:
Implementation complete (commit b6084fe3 on worktree-agent-a9439a49934c0832d).

DELIVERED:
1. normalizeOpenCodeModel(rawModel) added to src/lib/agent-identity.ts (lines 175-242). Documented with header comment explaining the rule (split on /, take trailing numeric tail of last token, flavor is first token only when 3+ segments).
2. Helper extractOpenCodeTrailingVersion handles consecutive hyphen-separated trailing numeric segments (claude-sonnet-4-5 -> '4.5').
3. Wired into normalizeAgentIdentity OpenCode branch (replaced 7-line passthrough at agent-identity.ts:243-250 with new branch using normalizeOpenCodeModel; parsed version wins over caller-supplied version per anti-leak rule).
4. toCanonicalLeaseIdentity special-cased for OpenCode: model is already a full path, so we skip the flavor/model join (otherwise we'd double-stamp openrouter).
5. New test file src/lib/__tests__/agent-identity-opencode.test.ts with 14 test cases across 3 describe blocks (canonical 3-segment paths, shorter/edge shapes, anti-leak regressions).

REGRESSION TESTING:
- src/lib/__tests__/agent-identity.test.ts existing 9 tests pass (incl. 'normalizes OpenCode agent identity' which still expects copilot/anthropic/claude-sonnet-4 -> agentModel='copilot/anthropic/claude-sonnet-4', agentVersion='4').
- src/lib/__tests__/agent-identity-display-parts.test.ts 11 tests pass.
- src/lib/__tests__/knots-canonical-metadata.test.ts 8 tests pass.

The screenshot bug is fixed: input { model: 'openrouter/moonshotai/kimi-k2.6', version: '4.7' (leaked) } now produces { provider: 'OpenCode', model: 'openrouter/moonshotai/kimi-k2.6', flavor: 'openrouter', version: '2.6' }.
